ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each element (UUID) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the element */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the element (e.g., stereotype, element property) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  "framework_id" TEXT /* ID of the architectural framework */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the element */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the element is active */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional attributes of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elements_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elements_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "element_id" TEXT /* ID of the element that owns the relationship */,
  "related_element_id" TEXT /* ID of the related element */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., composition, association) */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the relationship */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the relationship is active */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional attributes of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_related_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each client (UUID) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the client */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the client is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier (UUID) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "element_id" TEXT /* ID of the element being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the element */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)
